Megatrends

Vanguard’s “Megatrends” research investigates fundamental shifts in the global economy. We use the Vanguard Megatrends Model™ to quantify the impact of the long-term nature of shifts in technology, demographics, globalization, and more to help us understand how such forces may shape markets, individuals, and the investing landscape in the years ahead.
